# Grow Tomatoes in Pots

Tomatoes are the most rewarding container vegetable. Choose a compact variety, give it a deep pot, and keep watering consistent to avoid split fruit and blossom end rot.

## Container size

Use at least a 20-litre pot per plant. Determinate varieties stay compact; indeterminate ones need staking.

## Feeding

Feed with a tomato fertilizer every two weeks once flowers appear.

## Common problems

Blossom end rot comes from irregular watering. Mulch the surface to even out moisture.
